hero.title: A Management Student Seriously Building a Future in the Tech World.
hero.description: Transitioning from sports to a management major, then falling in love with programming. Today, I focus on building skills, projects, and experiences to turn curiosity into reality.

lanyard.tagline: Building the future through creativity, strategy, and technology

interactiveJourney.sectionDesc: An interactive roadmap of where business management principles and programming logic meet. Click on any milestone node to explore.

step1.title: Provincial Athlete (POPROV)
step1.label: POPROV Athlete
step1.shortDesc: Developed discipline, consistency, resilience, and a competitive mindset.
step1.longDesc: Competing as a provincial athlete taught me that success is a product of long-term dedication, physical and mental discipline, and resilience. I apply this competitive and hard-working mindset to coding and strategy every day.

step2.title: Creative Visual Designer
step2.label: Visual Designer
step2.shortDesc: Explored visual communication through posters, infographics, branding, and promotional materials.
step2.longDesc: Before programming, I developed visual assets for my church community and commercial promotions like Es Teh Poci. Designing taught me the power of layout, color theory, typography, and how to capture user attention.

step3.title: Management Student
step3.label: Management Student
step3.shortDesc: Learned strategic thinking, leadership, decision-making, and problem-solving.
step3.longDesc: My management studies at university taught me strategic business thinking, human resource management, and operations. This business logic helps me design digital products that solve real problems.

step4.title: Self-Taught Developer
step4.label: Self-Taught Developer
step4.shortDesc: Began learning programming and web development independently through real-world projects.
step4.longDesc: Independently mastering programming using online resources, documentation, and utilizing AI as a learning accelerator. Building modern, beautiful web projects with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Next.js.

step5.title: Future Digital Builder
step5.label: Future Builder
step5.shortDesc: Combining sports discipline, visual creativity, business thinking, and technology.
step5.longDesc: Combining all my strengths: sports discipline, visual design, strategic management, and modern programming. I aim to build technology-first solutions that deliver premium value and unforgettable digital experiences.

creativeJourney.sectionDesc: Before learning programming and building websites, I deeply explored visual communication and creative design. Through creating posters, infographics, event publications, and promotional materials, I learned that design is not just about visual aesthetics, but about communicating ideas effectively and creating meaningful experiences. This experience continues to influence how I view technology, digital products, and problem-solving today.

experienceCard1.title: Creative Visual Design
experienceCard1.desc: Responsible for creating visual assets to support church activities, events, and communication needs.

experienceCard2.title: Visual Promotional Design
experienceCard2.desc: Contributed to the creation of promotional materials and branding for the Es Teh Poci outlet, one of the most well-known beverage brands in the local area.

creativeJourney.lessonsSubtitle: The Impact of Visual Thinking on My Work

card1.title: Visual Communication
card1.desc: Learning to convey messages clearly through design and visual storytelling.

card2.title: Creativity
card2.desc: Developing a creative mindset and problem-solving through visual challenges.

card3.title: Branding
card3.desc: Understanding how visual identity can shape perception and foster trust.

card4.title: Audience Interaction
card4.desc: Learning how to capture the audience's attention and create memorable experiences.

card5.title: Storytelling
card5.desc: Using design elements to communicate ideas, emotions, and narratives.

card6.title: Precision Detail
card6.desc: Building the habit of focusing on accuracy and quality in every project.

creativeJourney.techDesc: The more I explored visual design, the more curious I became about how websites, apps, and digital products are actually made. Design taught me how to create attractive experiences. Programming taught me how to bring those experiences to life. Today, I continue to develop both skills in parallel because I believe great digital products require both creativity and technical execution.

about.sectionTitle: An Unplanned Journey, But Highly Meaningful.
about.sectionDesc: Since childhood, I have always been curious about technology. Even though my path diverged, every step I took ended up completing a piece of the puzzle for my future.

event1.title: Provincial Athlete (POPROV)
event1.desc: Before discovering coding, my life was filled with physical training. Competing up to the POPROV provincial level built the discipline, consistency, resilience, and tough mentality that I still carry with me today.

event2.title: Creative Visual Designer
event2.desc: Began exploring visual communication through posters, infographics, branding, and promotional materials for church communities and local businesses like Es Teh Poci.

event3.title: Management Student
event3.desc: When entering university, I chose Management as my major. Honestly, it wasn't the path I originally envisioned. But from here I learned strategic thinking, leadership, and business problem-solving.

event4.title: Self-Taught Developer
event4.desc: Everything changed when I got introduced to Roblox and started self-learning web development through various real projects using React, Next.js, and AI as a learning accelerator.

event5.title: Future Digital Builder
event5.desc: Combining sports discipline, visual creativity, business thinking, and technology to build digital products that are meaningful and deliver real-world impact.

skills.sectionDesc: A visual representation of the tools, technologies, and platforms utilized throughout my learning journey.

stage1.title: Creative Design
stage1.desc: Foundational visual design and layout composition using mobile and desktop tools.

stage2.title: Visual Communication
stage2.desc: Developing marketing collateral, branding elements, and community visual publications.

stage3.title: UI Exploration
stage3.desc: Understanding layouts, typography hierarchies, and interactive digital prototypes.

stage4.title: Web Development
stage4.desc: Learning core programming logic, web standards, semantic structures, and styling.

stage5.title: Modern Frontend Development
stage5.desc: Building highly dynamic, component-driven web applications with modern rendering.

stage6.title: Future Full Digital Builder
stage6.desc: Synthesizing visual creativity, strategic strategy, and full-stack software development.

workflows.title: Design Experience Visualization
workflows.desc: Connecting design tasks to the specific toolsets utilized in my creative projects:

canva.desc: Visual content platform for rapid layout and branding layout composition.

photoshop.desc: Advanced raster graphics editing, layout design, and photo manipulation.

illustrator.desc: Vector graphic asset design, print media layouts, and brand identity.

alight.desc: Mobile motion graphics editing, keyframe animation, and video effects.

capcut.desc: Mobile-first video editing, transitions, and audio sync orchestration.

html.desc: Semantic document structuring for accessible, SEO-compliant web pages.

css.desc: Responsive layouts, transitions, animations, and Tailwind styling grids.

js.desc: Interactive client-side behaviors, dynamic rendering, and logic execution.

ts.desc: Type-safe scalability, compiler verification, and developer tooling safety.

react.desc: Component-driven user interfaces, declarative state, and React Hook lifecycles.

nextjs.desc: Server-side rendering, routing optimization, and static compile architecture.

tailwind.desc: Utility-first styling, rapid visual prototyping, and layout consistency.

node.desc: Backend JavaScript runtime environment for tooling and compilation scripts.

git.desc: Distributed version control, branch histories, and repository tracking.

github.desc: Collaborative code management, deployment integration, and action runs.

vscode.desc: Code editing optimization, workspace custom extensions, and command terminal.

vercel.desc: Cloud deployment optimization, static edge networks, and instant preview builds.

ai.desc: Prompt engineering, debugging acceleration, and semantic codebase partner.

sports.sectionTitle: Lessons From the World of Sports
sports.cardDesc: Before diving into technology, I learned a lot from the world of sports. Competing up to the POPROV provincial level provided me with valuable lessons that I still carry with me today.
sports.sidebarDesc: Sports taught me that physical strength is less important than mental toughness. I bring this disciplined and resilient mindset into the world of coding.

lesson1.title: Discipline
lesson1.desc: Hard physical training shaped daily discipline, which I now apply to stay focused on learning and writing quality code every day.

lesson2.title: Consistency
lesson2.desc: Repeating athletic movements thousands of times taught me that mastering complex programming technologies is only achieved through constant practice.

lesson3.title: Mental Toughness
lesson3.desc: Staying calm under competitive pressure trained me to think logically and systematically when solving problems or fixing system bugs.

lesson4.title: Teamwork
lesson4.desc: Understanding players' roles and building trust on the sports field is just as important as collaborating in a developer team.

lesson5.title: Never Give Up
lesson5.desc: The desire to always exceed yesterday's limits drives me to continually explore modern technologies and creative solutions.

lesson6.title: Target Focus
lesson6.desc: Determining tactical steps to win a match builds the habit of planning coding project sprints in a highly targeted manner.

projects.sectionDesc: Most of these projects were born out of curiosity, experimentation, and a desire to keep learning new things.

project1.title: Personal Portfolio Website
project1.desc: A premium personal portfolio website designed with minimalist cards, cursor tracking, and physics-based timeline integration. Built to represent the creator's identity.

project2.title: Modern Landing Page
project2.desc: A modern premium landing page designed for agencies or SaaS products. Features grid animations, cursor hover effects, and responsive design.

project3.title: UI/UX Exploration
project3.desc: Visual user interface concepts combining ease of navigation with modern aesthetics. Balances high-contrast color schemes and information readability.

project4.title: Roblox Learning Project
project4.desc: Game exploration project in Roblox Studio using the Lua programming language. Handles event logic, 3D object behaviors, and gameplay mechanics.

philosophy.quote: "Major determines where we start, but does not dictate how far we can grow."

managementBlock.title: Management Strategy
managementBlock.desc: Management taught me how to understand problems. It gives me a broad perspective on operational strategy, leadership, and how to manage projects with clear direction.

programmingBlock.title: Programming Execution
programmingBlock.desc: Programming taught me how to build tangible solutions. It trains my logic, tactical problem-solving, and turning ideas into well-functioning products.

philosophy.closingStatement: When both are combined, I can see challenges from a broader perspective.

future.sectionDesc: A strategic roadmap for my future achievements and technology ambitions.

goal1.title: Deepening Web Development Skills
goal1.desc: Mastering modern frameworks (Next.js, React), styling layers (Tailwind, CSS), and programming logic. Committed to writing standard, clean code.

goal2.title: Working on Real-World Projects
goal2.desc: Building projects utilized by many users. Handling performance optimization, rendering speeds, and stable data integration.

goal3.title: Integrating Business & Technology
goal3.desc: Directly merging management business strategy with software development to construct strategic and tangible digital solutions.

goal4.title: Building Impactful Digital Products
goal4.desc: Creating independent digital products that yield wide positive impacts on society, industries, and simplify everyday life.

contact.sectionDesc: I am always open to discussions, collaborations, or just chatting about technology, business, and new ideas.

form.messagePlaceholder: Write your message or question here...

success.title: Message Sent!
success.desc: Thank you so much for taking the time to drop by and write a message. I will get back to your email shortly!

footer.title: Thank you for dropping by.
footer.subtitle: Still so much to learn, still so much to build.
footer.copyright: © Mybuu. Built using Next.js & Tailwind CSS.
